legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Hong Kong / 香港. Medical cannabis is illegal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.

notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Hong Kong / 香港. Medical cannabis is illegal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.
notes_raw: {{main|Cannabis in Hong Kong}} Possession, sale, transportation, and cultivation illegal under the Dangerous Drug Ordinance.<ref name="Police.gov.hk">{{citation |url = http://www.police.gov.hk/ppp_en/04_crime_matters/drug/law_pen.html |title = Information on the official web site of the Hong Kong Police Force |publisher = Police.gov.hk |access-date = 14 December 2011 |archive-date = 5 October 2019 |archive-url = https://web.archive.org/web/20191005070448/https://www.police.gov.hk/ppp_en/04_crime_matters/drug/law_pen.html |url-status = live }}</ref> (Chapter 134 of the [[Law of Hong Kong]])

facts.cultivation: cultivation illegal under the Dangerous Drug Ordinance.
